historical_facts.claim: PermissionDelegation allows accounts to delegate some permissions.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments describes account permission delegation.

historical_facts.claim: PermissionDelegation was disabled in v2.6.1 due to a bug and marked obsolete.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments warning says it will be replaced by PermissionDelegationV1_1.

safe_route_label.label: REJECT
safe_route_label.notes: Known Amendments says PermissionDelegation was disabled in v2.6.1 due to a bug.

short_description: Permission delegation amendment disabled due to a bug.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Allows accounts to delegate some permissions to other accounts.
